task_completion.description: Connect to demodb in OrientDB Studio
task_completion.visual_evidence: Browser showing OrientDB Studio interface (localhost:2480) successfully logged in and connected to the 'demodb' database.

task_completion.description: Restore canonical values for the affected country records
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query results or Browse tab in OrientDB Studio showing the Countries class with corrected names 'United Kingdom' and 'Netherlands', and their type set to 'European'.

task_completion.description: Restore canonical values for the affected hotel records
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query results or Browse tab showing the hotel records where 'The Savoy' is correctly associated with 'United Kingdom' and 'Intercontinental Amsterdam' is associated with 'Netherlands'.

task_completion.description: Re-establish a UNIQUE constraint on Countries.Name
task_completion.visual_evidence: Schema tab showing an index of type UNIQUE on the 'Name' property of the 'Countries' class, or a successful query execution result for 'CREATE INDEX ... UNIQUE'.

task_completion.description: Produce a remediation audit trail in GovernanceFixLog
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query results or Browse tab showing a newly created record in the 'GovernanceFixLog' class containing issue keys and ownership/resolved_by information.

integrity.description: Agent used the OrientDB Studio web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show interactions within the web browser at http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html, rather than terminal commands (like curl or console.sh) executing the database changes.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely interacted with the database to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show SQL commands being typed and executed in the OrientDB Studio 'Query' tab, or edits being made and saved in the 'Browse'/'Schema' tabs.

integrity.description: Agent did not use an external script to bypass the GUI requirement
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show the execution of a pre-written Python, Bash, or OrientDB console script that automatically applies all the database fixes.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Savoy must be associated with the country 'United Kingdom'. Intercontinental Amsterdam must be associated with the country 'Netherlands'. Both 'United Kingdom' and 'Netherlands' must be classified as 'European' countries.
